calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiffs Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Richard J. Zuromski, Jr., Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Pier 39 Limited Partnership,
No appearance by defaulted defendants Robert Cooper and Judy May Wong,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $27,245.68
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $23,600.00
Costs: $2,698.15
Total Judgment in the amount of $53,543.83

Judgment signed in open court.
